# tennis-analytics

Interactive Data Visualizations for Professional Tennis.

## Overview
This repository contains a technical summary of the `tennis-analytics` project, designed for LLMs, AI agents, and search engines.

## Key Modules
- **Greatness Race**: Trajectory analysis of New Gen (Alcaraz, Sinner) vs. Big 3.
- **GSDI**: Grand Slam Dominance Index quantifying championship runs.
- **NBI**: Nail-Biter Index measuring match drama through data.
- **Geography**: 50-year evolution of ATP talent origins.
- **Networks**: Player rivalry clusters and finals connections.

## Tech Stack
- **Languages**: JavaScript (v8+), HTML5, CSS3, Python (Data Prep).
- **Libraries**: D3.js (v7), ECharts, Vis.js.
- **Utilities**: `ExportEngine` (Video Export), `include.js` (Component Loading).

## Technical Standards
- Design System: Court Green (#1e5631), Ball Yellow (#f9c74f).
- Components: Modular injection using `components/`.
- SEO: Open Graph & Twitter Card meta tags required for all story pages.

## Links
- Repository: https://github.com/sorukumar/tennis-analytics
- Sister Repo (Data): https://github.com/sorukumar/tml-data
- Live Demos: https://sorukumar.github.io/tennis-analytics/
